items.title: This new tracking label could help solve cargo theft
items.summary: The Samsara Tracking Label hides a BLE system that can offer real-time location in a disposable package.
items.titleZh: 这种新的追踪标签可以帮助解决货物盗窃问题
items.summaryZh: Samsara跟踪标签隐藏了一个BLE系统，可以在一次性包装中提供实时位置。

items.title: Amazon’s record Prime Day masks a darker truth: Americans are spending more and getting less
items.summary: The world's biggest shopping event is breaking records—but shrinking cart sizes, debt-fueled checkouts and a bid for younger customers tell another story.
items.titleZh: 亚马逊创纪录的Prime Day掩盖了一个更黑暗的事实：美国人的支出越来越多，收入越来越少
items.summaryZh: 这场世界上最大的购物活动正在打破纪录，但购物车尺寸的缩小、债务驱动的结账和对年轻顾客的竞购则是另一回事。

items.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
items.summary: Named Jalapeño, the new processor was designed specifically for the unique needs of OpenAI's inference systems.
items.titleZh: OpenAI推出首款由Broadcom制造的定制芯片
items.summaryZh: 这款名为Jalapeño的新处理器是专门为OpenAI推理系统的独特需求而设计的。

items.title: Cerebras doubled its revenue. The stock fell anyway.
items.summary: Cerebras nearly doubled its revenue and guided 2026 sales above Wall Street’s estimates. Its stock still fell about 10%. The reason was a margin squeeze, caused not by a shortage of chips but by a shortage of buildings. Cerebras just learned the price of goin…
items.titleZh: Cerebras的收入翻了一番。不管怎样，股票还是下跌了。
items.summaryZh: Cerebras的收入几乎翻了一番，2026年的销售额超过了华尔街的预期。其股价仍下跌约10%。原因是利润率紧缩，不是因为芯片短缺，而是因为建筑短缺。Cerebras刚刚了解了去…

items.title: Google Home Speaker review: The smart speaker that elevates the Gemini for Home experience
items.summary: Google just launched its Google Home Speaker, a new smart home speaker that directly competes with the Apple HomePod mini and Echo Dot Max.
items.titleZh: Google Home Speaker评测：提升Gemini for Home体验的智能音箱
items.summaryZh: 谷歌刚刚推出了谷歌家庭扬声器，这是一款新的智能家居扬声器，与苹果HomePod mini和Echo Dot Max直接竞争。

items.title: 3 days left to save up to $190 on your Founder Summit 2026 pass
items.summary: 3 days left to save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 before Early Bird rates end on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register here.
items.titleZh: 还剩3天，您可以在2026年创始人峰会通行证上节省高达190美元
items.summaryZh: 在太平洋时间6月26日晚上11:59早鸟优惠结束之前，您还有3天的时间可以节省高达190美元的TechCrunch创始人峰会2026通行证费用。请在此处注册。

items.title: Valor Equity Partners looks to raise a $2.5B Fund VII, per Bloomberg
items.summary: New details have emerged about Valor's latest fund, which last year announced it was raising an unspecified amount of capital.
items.titleZh: 据彭博社报道，Valor Equity Partners计划筹集25亿美元的VII基金
items.summaryZh: 关于Valor最新基金的新细节已经浮出水面，该基金去年宣布将筹集未指明金额的资金。

items.title: Tesla sued over fatal crash in Texas home that killed 76-year-old woman
items.summary:
The family of a 76-year-old woman killed when a Tesla Model 3 crashed into her Katy, Texas, home has sued Tesla and the driver, alleging the company’s “Autopilot” and “Full Self-Driving” systems are defectively designed.
The wrongful death suit lands just day…
items.titleZh: 特斯拉起诉得克萨斯州家中发生致命车祸，导致76岁女子死亡
items.summaryZh: 一名76岁女子的家人起诉了特斯拉和司机，称该公司的“自动驾驶仪”和“全自动驾驶”系统设计有缺陷。

items.title: Slate Auto’s electric truck starts at $24,950 with 205 miles of range
items.summary:
Slate Auto, the EV startup backed by Jeff Bezos, finally revealed pricing for its bare-bones electric truck today: $24,950 to start. The company opened preorders the same day.
Slate also boosted the base model’s estimated range from 150 miles to around 205 mi…
items.titleZh: Slate Auto的电动卡车起价24950美元，续航里程205英里
items.summaryZh: 杰夫·贝佐斯支持的电动汽车初创公司Slate Auto今天终于公布了其纯电动卡车的定价：起价24950美元。该公司当天开始接受预订。

items.title: Ray Dalio just finished a 10-day trip to China. He says global leaders know America ‘doesn’t have what it takes to fight to maintain its empire’
items.summary: "Over the past few months there has been a big shift in the world order," the hedge fund billionaire wrote. He sees a "tribute" system rising in the east.
items.titleZh: Ray Dalio刚刚结束了为期10天的中国之旅。他说，全球领导人知道美国“没有能力为维护其帝国而战”
items.summaryZh: 这位对冲基金亿万富翁写道：“过去几个月，世界秩序发生了重大转变。”。他看到东方正在兴起一种“贡品”制度。

items.title: OpenAI unveils first chip as part of Broadcom deal in effort to 'build the full stack'
items.summary: Eight months after announcing a custom chip deal, OpenAI and Broadcom are revealing their first joint project: Jalapeño
items.titleZh: OpenAI推出首款芯片，作为博通交易的一部分，旨在“构建全栈”
items.summaryZh: 在宣布定制芯片协议八个月后，OpenAI和博通公布了他们的第一个联合项目：Jalapeño
